name: Hot-Tub within a Hot-Tub
description:
THIS IS YOUR VORE WARNING. THERE IS VORE HERE SO EITHER ENJOY IT OR GO ELSEWHERE

You're on a cruise all by yourself when you meet Kelly by the pool. She's a 20 year old from Florida who offers you a once in a lifetime Hot-Tub experience. How do you respond?

There are two initial messages. One of which starts with you meeting Kelly by the pool and lets you carry the story from there. Meanwhile the other starts after Kelly has devoured you and is relaxing in the hot-tub while you digest.
creator: ouiouiman
